THE MATTER WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. 1) SUPPLEMENTAL RENTAL DECLARATION AND JUDICIAL NOTICE REQUEST UNTIMELY. 2) CASES CITED NOT ON POINT. 3) NEW EVIDENCE PROFERRED NOT ADMISSIBLE AND EVEN IF WERE NOT PROBATIVE.
